overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through the futuristic city of Night City. The player character exits a modern building onto a covered walkway, crosses a busy intersection lined with palm trees and holographic billboards, and continues through the vibrant urban environment with towering glass skyscrapers and neon signage.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a modern building lobby with wooden floors, looking out through large glass doors at a futuristic cityscape with palm trees. The camera walks forward and exits the building around the 3-second mark, transitioning to a covered exterior walkway.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered exterior walkway with wooden decking, passing large building support columns and concrete planters with greenery. The walkway runs parallel to a street with bollards and an elevated highway structure visible in the distance. A pedestrian in a pink top walks past in the opposite direction.

events.description: leaves covered walkway and enters open intersection area
begins crossing the street at the crosswalk with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: approaching and crossing a multi-lane intersection, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic

vertical traffic signal poles with illuminated lights

illuminated signs and advertisements on building exteriors
large floating holographic advertisements above the street

segments.scene_description: Leaving the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection with clear blue skies. The camera approaches and enters a crosswalk with yellow stripes, joining other pedestrians crossing the multi-lane street. Futuristic glass buildings with neon signage and holographic billboards dominate the skyline, while vehicles wait at the traffic lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban plaza with holographic advertisements

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the tall skyscrapers and holographic displays overhead
passing through intersection reveals more of the futuristic cityscape with floating holograms

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while looking up at the towering buildings and holographic billboards

entered.detail: large decorative archway spanning across the street with intricate patterns
tall skyscraper with reflective blue-tinted glass windows
giant floating holographic advertisement displaying colorful imagery
distinctive building with pyramid-like geometry in the distance

segments.scene_description: Continuing across the wide intersection, the camera tilts upward around 35 seconds to admire the towering glass skyscrapers and massive holographic billboards floating above. A distinctive massive arch structure spans the street ahead, while palm trees line the pedestrian areas. The environment showcases the high-tech aesthetic of the city with bright neon accents against the morning sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street with commercial frontage

events.description: vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road while walking along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the city street sidewalk, observing the traffic and surrounding architecture

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past on the street

entered.detail: commercial storefronts at ground level of the buildings
low barriers separating the sidewalk from the street
pedestrian bridge or elevated transit line crossing above

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows continued movement along a multi-lane city street with moderate vehicle traffic passing by. The camera walks past street-level shops and traffic barriers, with palm trees lining the sidewalk. The massive arch structure and crosswalk are left behind as the journey continues through the bustling futuristic metropolis with elevated walkways visible overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the quiet interior of a modern building into the sprawling, high-tech vibrancy of a futuristic metropolis. It begins inside a lobby with wooden floors, moving forward through large glass doors to transition onto a covered exterior walkway lined with concrete planters and support columns. As the camera leaves the shelter of the walkway, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection under clear blue skies, where the viewer joins other pedestrians crossing a yellow-striped street amidst waiting vehicles. The perspective then tilts upward to take in towering glass skyscrapers and massive floating holographic billboards before moving past a distinctive arch structure and palm trees. Finally, the camera continues along a bustling multi-lane street, passing street-level shops and traffic barriers as the intersection recedes and the city's elevated walkways loom overhead.
